title: neocheiropteris subhastata
intro: Neocheiropteris subhastata is a type of fern plant belonging to the family Blechnaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris subhastata include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are applied topically to the affected area or taken orally to reap its benefits.
